summary: LR0 Truth Reset is publicly verified and closed. The current main branch remains an audit and status shell, the stronger production-app foundation remains preserved in the archive, and LR1 pilot selection is the only active decision gate.

verifiedCapabilities: safe browser and proxy director commands

productionFoundation.restoreRule: Restore atomically with tests. Never merge the archive wholesale.

productArchitecture.target: One production app with a small truthful status view, not a status app replacing production.

canon.rule: A test, commit or document cannot approve creative canon without an explicit human decision.

evidence.historicalSnapshotBoundary: The old closure covered a fixed selection through PR #30 and is not a live proof of the complete repository history.
evidence.priorityRule: Every new claim needs source, test, artifact or explicit not-applicable reason, run proof and visible review. Missing evidence stays open.

verifiedNow: LR0 Truth Reset was merged in commit 47b513c31d5326efdf5bd8c81e835233f97b6b47.
GitHub Pages run 29143665894 passed public runtime and screenshot verification.
The four-second M1 clip proves a technical media path only.
The archive branch preserves the earlier Vite and React production foundation.
The reviewed recovery scope produced zero trustworthy visual character or location masters.
Character masters remain 0/4, location masters 0/4, approved voices 0/3 and finished episodes 0.
notAuthorizedAsFinal: Das Zimmer as selected pilot canon
Der Solidarpreis as selected pilot canon
the four text merge bibles as final user-approved canon
the eight-panel 45.5-second blueprint as final creative canon
the current dashboard as the complete Comic Factory product
stopRules: No Growth OS, social automation or new platform architecture.
No new story, character or visual generation before canon selection and production-app recovery.
No final, production-ready or complete claim without an external countercheck.
Only Pagebabe/comic may be modified for this recovery line.

nextSequence.title: Truth reset
nextSequence.doneWhen: Public dashboard, README, director and CI all show the same non-percentage truth state.

nextSequence.title: Pilot decision
nextSequence.doneWhen: One candidate is explicitly selected by the user and the other remains traceably archived.

nextSequence.title: Studio foundation rescue
nextSequence.doneWhen: The neutral Vite and React foundation is restored under a tested studio route without importing candidate material as canon.

nextSequence.title: Minimal production loop rescue
nextSequence.doneWhen: Control, Studio, Prompt Queue, Import, Review, QA, Lettering, Package and Restore run as one tested loop.

nextSequence.title: Real fire test
nextSequence.doneWhen: A selected pilot package completes import, review, QA, lettering, export, state deletion and successful restore.

nextSequence.title: Visual and audio locks
nextSequence.doneWhen: Character, set and voice references are visibly reviewed and approved.

nextSequence.title: First real pilot
nextSequence.doneWhen: A complete reviewed episode export exists.
